name: Ayes Celik Hasir Ve Cit Sanayi A.S.
summary: Ayes Celik Hasir Ve Cit Sanayi A.S. manufactures and sells wire meshes in Turkey. The company provides Q type and R type wire meshes, fence meshes, and welded and special wire meshes; and coil bar-wire rods, cutted deformed bars, stirrup rebars, and steel rebars. It also offers drawing, wire cutting, butt welding, and mesh bending machines; panel fences; and reinforcement stands. The company was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
